name: Megu
message: "We were talking about going to karaoke after school today."

name: Megu
message: "I wonder if they have that new song I was listening to the other day."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... Though the CD just came out, so I doubt they have it yet."

name: Megu
message: "Oh, that's right, what about those concert tickets I was asking you about before?"

name: Satoko
message: "Megu, how did your cell phone novel turn out?"

name: Megu
message: "I gave up. I'm no good at writing. That's probably why my grades in Japanese are so bad, too."

name: Zakuro
message: "Writing something like that must be hard."

name: Satoko
message: "Do we really have to write it? Couldn't we express ourselves some other way?"
That lifestyle suddenly came to a close.
On that day, after the accident, my life as a worm ended.
Now everyone talks to me like normal, and we go out to karaoke or get fast food together sometimes.
They don't mind if I hang out with them.
But... maybe that's even scarier than the way it was before.
I always have to watch their expressions closely.
I always try to be cheerful around them.

name: Satoko
message: "Oh, you got a new phone, Megu."

name: Kimika
message: "Didn't you just get a new one?"

name: Megu
message: "Isn't it? Look, Tachibana, I'll take a picture of you."

name: Satoko
message: "That's right. Smile for the camera, Kimika."
Akasaka-san was taking pictures, and behind her, Kitami-san was recording us with a video camera.
There's no way I could ask "What's that?"...
If I asked, they would probably...

name: Kimika
message: "Why do you have a video camera?"
Kimika looked toward me for an instant.

name: Satoko
message: "Now then... Why don't you lift up your skirt?"

name: Megu
message: "Kimika-chan, what kind of panties are you wearing?"

name: Satoko
message: "Come on, why don't you lift up your skirt for a second?"

name: Megu
message: "Don't worry, don't worry. We're in the back. No one's looking this way."
Even if we are in the back... The restaurant is full of people...
What are they trying to do?
It's the same feeling as when they used to bully me.
Akasaka-san's mouth moved right next to Kimika's ear.
Then she whispered something to her.

name: Satoko
message: "Takashima, why don't you get a hamburger or something?"

name: Megu
message: "I'm telling you, you're overthinking it. Right, Satoko?"
Akasaka-san pointed the camera toward Kitami-san next.

name: Satoko
message: "Now let me see the camera for a second."
Kitami-san took the camera from Akasaka-san and jammed it up her skirt.

name: Megu
message: "Ow, ow, ow, knock it off, ahahahaha."

name: Megu
message: "Ahahahaha... It was probably too dark to see anything on camera."

name: Megu
message: "Satoko, lift up your skirt a bit."

name: Megu
message: "Come on, give us a little more."
